APPEARANCES BY (2) DEFENDANTS / CROSS-COMPLAINANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT MR. ANG AGREES TO DISMISS CASE NO. CSM-16-851902, ANG V. MURPHY, SET ON 05/18/2016 AT 1:30PM AS LONG AS MR. MURPHY DOES NOT APPEAR ON 05/18/2016. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS: L. FONG AND S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURPHY, EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANG, DOMINIC AU, PAULINE C. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ANG, DOMINIC AU, PAULINE C. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MURPHY, EDWARD $687.51 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $737.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
